label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won solo after dominating every breakaway formation from the start, taking victory by over a minute after apparently collapsing on Stage 13.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL attacked repeatedly in early breakaway formations despite previous day's collapse, revealing exceptional recovery or prior day's tactical bluff.
24-rider breakaway swelled as GC teams allowed gap over 6 minutes, suggesting Soudal lacks domestique strength to control from peloton.
AYUSO marked every time by KUSS/ROGLIC teammates when attempting moves, showing Jumbo's tactical focus on stopping UAE gaps.
STORER isolated from chase groups while hunting KOM points, indicating AG2R failed to commit team resources to jersey competition.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: complete reversal from Stage 13 collapse to dominating breakaway formations suggests either sandbagging or superhuman recovery capacity
rider_signals.BARDET Cyril: neutral: offered domestique support to EVENEPOEL despite being potential stage contender himself on hometown roads
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: negative: repeatedly marked by Jumbo riders when testing legs, suggesting GC rivals view him as primary threat to podium positions
rider_signals.STORER Michael: negative: isolated in KOM chase despite starting as favorite, lost jersey to opportunistic EVENEPOEL showing poor team support
